# Image Generation Prompts — 2 Songs × 2 Prompts
## Generated by Grok 4.5, 2026-07-11

---

### NO THIRD DOOR — A (Cover)

Bird's-eye shot straight down a brutalist stairwell shaft, concrete landings stacking into a perfect geometric spiral, a lone figure mid-stride two floors below casting a hard shadow across the treads. Late golden-hour light knifes in from a fire-escape landing, catching cigarette butts and scuffed rubber sole marks like constellation points on gray stone. Palette of warm amber, cool slate, and one thin ribbon of sunset orange at the open door. Shot like large-format architectural photography, 1:1 square, high contrast, no faces readable, no text, no logos — just the staircase as an honest vertical mirror.

---

### NO THIRD DOOR — B (Atmospheric)

Low dusk haze over a city skyline seen through black iron fire-escape bars, the metal grating still faintly warm, sweat-darkened handprints cooling on the rail. Soft motion blur on distant footsteps climbing, breath fogging in cooler air while the mind stays sharp and alone but not lonely. Color grade of desaturated concrete blues bleeding into copper sunset, grain like 35mm night film, shallow depth of field on rust flakes and grit. Vertical 4:5 frame, cinematic low-key lighting, tactile and kinetic without a clear subject or any lettering.

---

### EXACTLY ON TIME — A (Cover)

Centered overhead of an open notebook on a worn classroom desk, two concentric circles inked soft in the margin — outer ring crisp, inner ring slightly feathered where the pen paused — chalk dust catching a single shaft of afternoon sun. The rest of the page empty, wood grain and eraser crumbs as quiet texture, warm ivory paper against cool slate desk laminate. Soft natural sidelight, shallow focus, still-life photography vibe, muted F-major warmth tipping toward D-minor shadow at the edges. Square 1:1 crop, intimate and iconic, no handwriting words, no titles, just the recursion of circle inside circle.

---

### EXACTLY ON TIME — B (Atmospheric)

A half-closed notebook sliding into a wooden drawer, pages catching the last strip of window light so the chalk-dust motes hang like tape hiss made visible. Soft electric-piano keys out of focus in the background, cream and dusty rose tones with a faint vinyl-crackle grain across the frame. Warm without sentimentality — the feeling of something folded shut, forgotten, then found exactly when it needed to be. Horizontal 16:9, diffused sidelight, painterly documentary still, implied story through gesture and dust, zero text or logos.
